x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for FSM requires a dedicated plugin. Without it all Now Assist FSM AI capabilities are unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for Field Service Management (sn_fsm_gen_ai) via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm FSM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.
